description_long: This object is a pair of scissors with a distinctive, elongated triangular blade design and a single circular handle loop. The blades are metallic, featuring a central ridge for added strength and a sharp, pointed tip for precision cutting. The handle is a solid ring, likely made of the same metal as the blades, and is attached to the blade assembly with visible fasteners, possibly screws or rivets. The overall construction appears robust, with a matte, dark metallic finish and minimal decorative elements. The scissors are utilitarian, likely intended for tasks requiring fine control and accuracy, such as in crafts or light industrial work. There are no visible brand markings or ergonomic enhancements on the handle.
description: A robust, pointed pair of scissors with a single circular metal handle and a matte dark finish. The design is utilitarian, with visible fasteners and no decorative or ergonomic features.
description_view_0: A narrow side profile showing the thinness of the blades and handle.
description_view_1: A full frontal view displaying the pointed blades, central ridge, and circular handle loop with visible fasteners.
description_view_2: A narrow side profile similar to view 0, emphasizing the slim construction.
description_view_3: A rear view nearly identical to the front, showing the blade shape and handle loop from the opposite side.
attribute_handle_type: Single circular metal handle, symmetrical, not ergonomic, ambidextrous, no coating or padding.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible screw or rivet joint, not adjustable, standard fixed pivot.
attribute_finger_loop_design: Single round loop, medium size, smooth surface, accommodates one or two fingers, no anatomical contour.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed tip, designed for precision cutting, standard sharp style.
